title: Canonical skill
description: Target contract for .agents/skills/<id>/SKILL.md frontmatter. DEFINITION ONLY — not enforced in PR B. Three frontmatter variants currently exist across 33 .agents skills: 'name+description' (27), 'trigger+description' with NO name (6: banebyg, bdk-brand-governance, bdk-legal-mapping, bdk-gdpr-praksis, shared-quality, shared-docx), and 'version+name+description' (Higgsfield skills). Normalizing the 6 trigger-only skills to carry name is a LATER migration, not PR B.

name.description: Lowercase-hyphen; MUST equal the skill directory name (validate-harness checks name==dir).

description.description: What the skill does + when to use it (trigger intent embedded in prose).

trigger.description: Optional supplemental trigger keywords. Supplement to name+description, NOT a replacement for name.

version.description: Optional semantic version. Allowed because Higgsfield skills carry it.

status.description: FORELOEBIG = placeholder/provisional. 'candidate' = source-library capability not yet an active skill.

source.description: Origin, e.g. mattpocock-skills (vendor), Banedanmark domain, higgsfield-ai/skills.

runtime_support.description: Adapter ids that can render/execute this skill. Planned; not populated in PR B.

$comment: Scope note: 33 .agents/skills, 73 .vscode/.codex/skills, 35 root skills/ (legacy), plus vendor read-only copies under .agents/vendor/. This schema targets the .agents curated layer. Source-library capability CANDIDATES (not active skills yet): design-artifacts (claude-design.md), visual-explainer (visualize.md), deep-research (research_instructions.md) — see docs/agents/sources/. 73-vs-33 reconciliation and name-vs-trigger normalization are OPEN DECISIONS.
